S.FORM: kkbayra hga' ga kumay ru hga' mlaka'. hga' kmraw mkaraw qqhuniq ru kk'man.
S.PHON: kkβajra ħɣaʔ ɣa kumaj ru ħɣaʔ mlakaʔ. ħɣaʔ kmraw mkaraw qqħuniq ru kkʔman.
S.FORM: kkbayra hga' ga kumay ru hga' mlaka'. hga' kmraw mkaraw qqhuniq ru kk'man.
S.PHON: kkβajra ħɣaʔ ɣa kumaj ru ħɣaʔ mlakaʔ. ħɣaʔ kmraw mkaraw qqħuniq ru kkʔman.
